title: Enterprise SaaS baseline framework stack
arguments: B2B SaaS platform selling to enterprise customers in US and EU with no healthcare data, no payment card processing, and no government contracts. Need baseline compliance stack and implementation plan. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US,EU --industry saas --strict-facts

title: US-only SaaS baseline security posture
arguments: US-only B2B SaaS with no EU users, no healthcare data, no payment card data, and no government contracts needs practical baseline compliance guidance. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry saas --strict-facts

title: US federal cloud vendor baseline
arguments: Cloud software vendor serving US federal civilian agencies needs baseline security and assurance framework strategy for 2026 roadmap. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry gov-cloud --strict-facts

title: US healthcare SaaS baseline plus security frameworks
arguments: US healthcare SaaS handling PHI for hospitals with no EU users needs compliance baseline and control harmonization plan. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry healthcare-saas --strict-facts

title: Global SaaS certification harmonization
arguments: Global SaaS with EU and California customer data is preparing a multi-year certification and attestation strategy and wants to reduce duplicate controls. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US_CA --industry saas --strict-facts
